text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop by my office before training to find that
Satono Diamond has already arrived. She seems
to be reading something...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Every tiny letter on this page is packed with a
piece of the author's feelings, huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. I received some fan mail.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Such powerful emotions have been imbued into
the text... I can't help but read them over and
over.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
He started a business that went under, and his life
fell into disarray.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
He felt strong regret for putting his family
through tough times, and was at a complete loss
about what to do.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But one day, he happened to see one of my races
on TV.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The powerful desire I showed to break my family's
jinx gave him courage.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
He's working another job now, but continues to
plan out his next business idea a little bit at a
time. He hasn't given up on his dream.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Some of the writing is shaky, while some of it
feels empowered... The name at the end is written
incredibly neatly.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure he gathered his resolve and is working
hard to carve a path forward, just like I am.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. And if a kindred spirit is working hard, then
I can't afford to drag my feet.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now, it's time to give it my best in training and
carve out a new path of my own!
